name: Sage of Silence
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>静</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>寂</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゃく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>聖</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>者</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゃ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle, your opponent cannot activate Spell Cards during the next turn.
mnst_eff: If this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle, your opponent cannot activate Spell Cards during the next turn.
eff: If this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle, your opponent cannot activate Spell Cards during the next turn.

action: Activates if it destroys a monster by battle
mst: Prevents activation of your opponent's Spell Cards
